who: small to medium-sized insurance agencies processing 10-50 claims/month
offer: For small to medium-sized insurance agencies processing 10-50 claims/month, inefficient claims processing causes delayed reimbursements. We automate claims processing instead of manual claims processing and reporting.
channels_free: Post in Reddit communities for insurance agencies
Engage in Indie Hackers discussions on similar workflows
DM outreach to targeted insurance agencies with demo video
Participate in community forums for insurance tools
try_it: Let users try user-friendly dashboard for claims tracking
pay: unknown with a clear upgrade path
cheap_execution_checklist: Create a landing page with one-liner and CTA
Produce a demo video of the manual workflow
Conduct 10 short interviews with target users
Offer early-access onboarding for first 10 users
Share weekly progress updates in relevant communities
automation_simplification_ideas: One-click export of a simple report
